channel.title: Posts on Greg Beifuss
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Greg Beifuss

item.title: Resolving HP iLO NAND Error
item.description: Resolve an HP iLO “Embedded Flash\NAND error” alarm by formatting NAND

item.title: HP iLO C7000 Credential Reset
item.description: Forcibly reset C7000 Onboard Administrator credentials via. script on USB key

item.title: Remediating Log4j in VMWare VCenter 6.5
item.description: Step-by-step instructions for mitigating log4j on VMWare VCenter 6.5

item.title: ESXi 6.0 to 6.5 Upgrade
item.description: Upgrading ESXi 6.0 to 6.5, step-by-step

item.title: Forcibly Remove Computer from Domain
item.description: Use Command Prompt to remove a computer from a domain, when you cannot contact the domain

item.title: Removing GIT History
item.description: How to remove files completely from the history of a git repository

item.title: Managing Mailbox moves in Exchange 2016
item.description: Set Exchange to continually report on the status of mailbox moves and keep the queue full, via. Powershell scripts. Also, disable indexing during a migration.

item.title: Linux Upskill Challenge
item.description: Linux notes from completing /r/linuxupskillschallenge

item.title: Hugo & Google Analytics
item.description: How to integrate Google Analytics with a Hugo website

item.title: VS Code & Markdown
item.description: Prevent VS Code from automatically trimming any trailing whitespace in markdown files

item.title: Working with JSON in Powershell
item.description: Passing a Powershell object to the Netscaler API via. JSON

item.title: Cisco Management Tunnel - ASA Configuration
item.description: Configuring a Cisco ASA to support a Management Tunnel

item.title: Cisco Management Tunnel - NDES Setup
item.description: How to configure NDES and Certificate Templates to support a Cisco Management Tunnel

item.title: Cisco Management Tunnel
item.description: What is a Cisco AnyConnect Management Tunnel?

item.title: Installing a certificate in PowerApps
item.description: Installing a TLS/SSL certificate in Microsoft Dynamics PowerApps

item.title: Rewrite HTTP/1.0 requests to HTTP/1.1 with Netscaler
item.description: Block HTTP/1.0 requests with Netscaler, to prevent internal IP disclosure from Exchange, by rewriting them to HTTP/1.1

item.title: Remediating an Internal IP Disclosure with Netscaler
item.description: How to use Netscaler to remediate a Nessus-reported internal IP disclosure for Exchange

item.title: Using multicursor in VS Code
item.description: Turning on multiple cursors in Visual Studio Code for faster editing

item.title: Hugo error - REF_NOT_FOUND
item.description: Resolving the Hugo error “REF_NOT_FOUND” when compiling a website

item.title: Exchange Transaction Logs won't clear
item.description: Exchange Transaction Logs should clear after a successful backup, but what if they’re not being deleted?

item.title: Exchange DAGs and Cluster Ownership
item.description: Use Powershell to change the cluster owner for ‘Available Storage’ and ‘Cluster Group’ in an Exchange DAG. Setup a Notification in PRTG along with a trigger to move the owner back.

item.title: Truncate Exchange Transaction Logs
item.description: Using diskshadow to take a ‘fake backup’ so that Exchange will start purging transaction logs

item.title: Page References in Hugo
item.description: How to use Hugo’s shortcodes for creating links to pages and sections on your site, and escaping shortcodes

item.title: Amending a Git Commit Statement
item.description: How to quickly change the git commit message before a push has occurred

item.title: Powershell & PowerPlatform API ... now using the Graph API
item.description: Querying the Microsoft PowerPlatform API with Powershell and the Graph API. Also, using fixed-width font in an email with Powershell output.

item.title: Using Powershell to interact with Task Scheduler
item.description: Using Powershell to query Task Scheduler across the domain. Also, using Powershell to change Task properties for select Tasks.

item.title: Use .Summary in Hugo with the Stack theme
item.description: Edit Hugo’s configuration to make use of the .summary Front Matter with the Stack theme

item.title: Troubleshooting Hugo's 'Port 1313 already in use' error
item.description: Fix the Hugo error “Port 1313 already in use” by freeing it up. WinNAT was the culprit.

item.title: Adding TLS 1.2 support for Powershell
item.description: Update Powershell to use TLS 1.2, and configure Windows to use TLS 1.2 as well

item.title: Enter-PSSession, WinRM & NLA
item.description: Troubleshooting and resolving the Powershell error “WinRM cannot complete the operation”

item.title: Exchange & -DeleteContent
item.description: Administratively deleting content from an Exchange Mailbox with Powershell

item.title: Network Troubleshooting and MTU
item.description: Diagnosing and resolving an MTU issue over a L2 link

item.title: Pushing to GitHub via. Git
item.description: Resolving a ‘Permission Denied (publickey)’ error in git, when pushing to github

item.title: Powershell & NTMLv1 use
item.description: Find NTLM traffic authenticating to domain controllers with Powershell

item.title: Pushing Hugo Content to GitHub
item.description: Have Hugo generate your site content and use git to push up to github.io

item.title: Array Speed in Powershell
item.description: Powershell has a number of ways to reference arrays, some that are faster than others. += is terribly slow compared to ArrayList

item.title: Powershell Stopwatch vs Measure-Command
item.description: What’s the difference between Stopwatch and Measure-Command?

item.title: Powershell & Unresponsive Remote Sessions
item.description: Elegantly killing a CPU-consuming remote Powershell session

item.title: Powershell, Exchange & TLS
item.description: Using Powershell to find the TLS versions used to connect to Exchange

item.title: Docker & Printnightmare
item.description: Using Docker for Windows to scan for PrintNightmare (CVE-2021-34527)

item.title: VS Code & Remote Repositories
item.description: Using the Remote Repositories Extension in VS Code to update github content

item.title: VS Code Snippets
item.description: Creating custom snippets in VS Code to simplify writing code

item.title: Powershell, DSInternals & HIBP
item.description: Auditing AD passwords against Have I Been Pwned? by using Powershell

item.title: Running Powershell scripts with Task Scheduler
item.description: Scheduling a Powershell script in Task Scheduler via. GUI, and a shortcut to doing it repeatedly.

item.title: Powershell & PowerPlatform API
item.description: Querying the Microsoft PowerPlatform API with Powershell

item.title: Powershell & Netscaler API
item.description: Saving a Netscaler configuration via. API with Powershell
